persistentStore.goal: client-bot-channel binding and patched posts survive redeploys and code updates

postArchive.currentStoragePolicy: store all posts/snapshots physically; tariff limits 5/15/30 are marketing limits to apply later without deleting stored data

polls.mode: callback buttons under patched MAX post
polls.reason: the previous polls section was only a shell and had no creation/voting mechanism

policy: No video/files in comments. Photos only inside comments. Native inline hints only; no overlay/float hints.
debugPolicy: Clean V3 menu audit routes plus Postgres store/archive/polls status. No stress in normal checks.
manualCheck: After redeploy open /version?t=1540 and verify buildInfo displayVersion CC7.5.40 if build-info is surfaced
Open MAX /start and verify channel/post binding survived without re-forwarding a channel post
Open Голосовалки / опросы → choose post → create quick poll → vote by callback button under post
Open Архив / восстановление and verify archive counts survived the same update
liveSyncAudit: PR173 audits and hardens the production AdminKIT Push flow while preserving PR168/PR170 behavior
